title: Human-State Compatibility, Authority, and Governed Migration
description: Migrate temporal human state into generic Enki through explicit expression-origin decisions, human-protection policies, content-addressed plans, approval-bound execution, immutable receipts, and exact recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Legacy observations and transitions project into generic Enki without rewriting historical source records
Every observation has an explicit expression-origin decision and preserved source lineage
Consent, purpose, privacy, correction, retraction, expiration, revocation, and redaction protections fail closed
Legacy model-feedback approval fields cannot satisfy generic authority
Migration plans and approvals bind the exact subject, payload hash, policy, purpose, context, and transaction
Interrupted migration recovers through the same transaction without duplicate or semantically altered state

evidence.description: Governed human migration and protection implementation.
Declared migration paths achieved runtime coverage.
